case_title: JACOB THOMPSON VS. SHOPCO TECHNOLOGIES CORP.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT SHOPCO TECHNOLOGIES CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, JACOB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHOPCO TECHNOLOGIES CORP. $8,205.60 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,295.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-30-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHOPCO TECHNOLOGIES CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2018 BY LESLIE C. NICHOLS. 506 PLAINTIFF JACOB THOMPSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,205.60 FILED BY THOMPSON, JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT SHOPCO TECHNOLOGIES CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
